ddls:
CREATE TABLE "digital_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the digital object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of digital object (e.g., item, asset) */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the object */,
  "parent_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the parent object, if applicable */,
  "project_key" TEXT /* Project key associated with the object */,
  "collection_term_value" TEXT /* Collection term value for categorization */,
  "collection_term_uri" TEXT /* URI for the collection term */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the digital object */,
  "name_type" TEXT /* Type of the name (e.g., corporate, personal) */,
  "name_role_value" TEXT /* Role of the name (e.g., photographer) */,
  "name_role_authority" TEXT /* Authority for the name role */,
  "name_role_uri" TEXT /* URI for the name role */,
  "name_authority" TEXT /* Authority for the name */,
  "name_uri" TEXT /* URI for the name */,
  "date_created_start" TEXT /* Start date of object's creation */,
  "date_created_end" TEXT /* End date of object's creation */,
  "date_created_type" TEXT /* Type of date created (e.g., approximate) */,
  "date_created_textual" TEXT /* Textual representation of creation date */,
  "abstract_value" TEXT /* Abstract or description of the digital object */,
  "object_size" INTEGER /* Size of the digital object in bytes */,
  "object_format" TEXT /* File format of the digital object */,
  "preservation_status" TEXT /* Current preservation status */,
  "access_rights" TEXT /* Access rights associated with the object */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the object */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the digital object */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the digital object */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the digital object was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_objects_collection_term_value FOREIGN KEY ("collection_term_value") REFERENCES collections ("collection_term_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_objects_project_key FOREIGN KEY ("project_key") REFERENCES projects ("project_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "identifiers" (
  "identifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each identifier record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated digital object */,
  "identifier_value" TEXT /* The unique identifier value */,
  "identifier_type" TEXT /* Type of identifier (e.g., DOI, ISBN) */,
  "identifier_authority" TEXT /* Authority for the identifier (e.g., CrossRef, Library of Congress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_identifiers_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES digital_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_key" TEXT /* Key associated with the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_term_value" TEXT /* Value of the collection term */,
  "collection_term_uri" TEXT /* URI for the collection term */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "collection_type" TEXT /* Type of collection (e.g., historical, contemporary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "names" (
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each name record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated digital object */,
  "name_value" TEXT /* Name value */,
  "name_type" TEXT /* Type of the name (e.g., corporate, personal) */,
  "role_value" TEXT /* Role value for the name */,
  "role_authority" TEXT /* Authority for the name role */,
  "role_uri" TEXT /* URI for the name role */,
  "name_source" TEXT /* Source of the name (e.g., cataloger, metadata) */,
  "name_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the name (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_names_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES digital_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates_created" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated digital object */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of object creation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of object creation */,
  "date_type" TEXT /* Type of date (e.g., approximate) */,
  "textual_date" TEXT /* Textual representation of creation date */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who recorded the creation date */,
  "date_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the date (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dates_created_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES digital_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abstracts" (
  "abstract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each abstract record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated digital object */,
  "abstract_value" TEXT /* The abstract or description of the digital object */,
  "abstract_language" TEXT /* Language of the abstract */,
  "abstract_type" TEXT /* Type of abstract (e.g., short, long) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abstract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abstracts_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES digital_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated digital object */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code representing the location */,
  "location_value" TEXT /* Value of the location term */,
  "location_authority" TEXT /* Authority for the location term */,
  "location_uri" TEXT /* URI for the location term */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., physical, digital) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES digital_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shelf_locations" (
  "shelf_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shelf location record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated location */,
  "shelf_free_text" TEXT /* Free text description of the shelf location */,
  "box_number" TEXT /* Box number of the shelf location */,
  "folder_number" TEXT /* Folder number of the shelf location */,
  "shelf_location_type" TEXT /* Type of shelf location (e.g., box, folder) */,
  "shelf_location_description" TEXT /* Description of the shelf location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shelf_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shelf_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated digital object */,
  "note_value" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note */,
  "note_author" TEXT /* User who created the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES digital_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated digital object */,
  "format_value" TEXT /* Value representing the format */,
  "format_authority" TEXT /* Authority for the format term */,
  "format_uri" TEXT /* URI for the format term */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "format_version" TEXT /* Version of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formats_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES digital_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated digital object */,
  "language_value" TEXT /* Language value used in cataloging */,
  "language_authority" TEXT /* Authority for the language term */,
  "language_uri" TEXT /* URI for the language term */,
  "language_description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "language_script" TEXT /* Script used for the language (e.g., Latin, Cyrillic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES digital_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated digital object */,
  "subject_topic_value" TEXT /* Subject topic value */,
  "subject_topic_authority" TEXT /* Authority for the subject topic term */,
  "subject_topic_uri" TEXT /* URI for the subject topic term */,
  "subject_type" TEXT /* Type of subject (e.g., topic, genre) */,
  "subject_source" TEXT /* Source of the subject (e.g., cataloger, metadata) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES digital_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_subjects" (
  "geo_subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic subject record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated digital object */,
  "geo_value" TEXT /* Geographic value */,
  "geo_authority" TEXT /* Authority for the geographic term */,
  "geo_uri" TEXT /* URI for the geographic term */,
  "geographic_subject_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic subject (e.g., city, country) */,
  "geographic_subject_source" TEXT /* Source of the geographic subject (e.g., cataloger, metadata) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_subjects_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES digital_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated digital object */,
  "title_non_sort_portion" TEXT /* The non-sort portion of the title */,
  "title_sort_portion" TEXT /* The sort portion of the title */,
  "title_type" TEXT /* Type of title (e.g., main, subtitle) */,
  "title_language" TEXT /* Language of the title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_titles_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES digital_objects ("object_id")
)
